translation.en: O He Who forgives abundantly
O He Who conceals faults generously
O He Who punishes justly
O He Who rewards magnificently
O He Who pardons graciously
O He Whose command is in effect
O He Whose Book is a proof
O He Whose judgment is fair
O He Whose Religion is Islam

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ نَبِيُّهُ مُحَمَّدٌ صَلَّى اللّٰهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man nabiyyuhū Muḥammadun ṣallā'llāhu 'alayhi wa sallam

translation.en: O He Whose Prophet is Muhammad, peace be upon him

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He to Whom I complain
O He before Whom I humble myself
O He to Whom I weep
O He from Whom I ask help
O He in Whom I place my hope
O He upon Whom I rely
O He from Whom I seek cure
O He from Whom I request well-being
O He to Whom I flee
O He to Whom I submit

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Lord of everything
O God of everything
O Creator of everything
O Owner of everything

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فَوْقَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa fawqa kulli shay'

translation.en: O He Who is above everything

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ قَبْلَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa qabla kulli shay'

translation.en: O He Who is before everything

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بَعْدَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa ba'da kulli shay'

translation.en: O He Who is after everything
O He Who knows everything

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَقْدِرُ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ

translation.en: O He Who has power over everything

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ قَيُّومُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Qayyūmu kulli shay'

translation.en: O He Who is the Sustainer of everything

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He Who turns hearts
O He Who adorns hearts
O He Who purifies hearts
O He Who illuminates hearts
O He Who is the Beloved of hearts
O He Who is the Healer of hearts
O He Who is the Companion of hearts
O He Who enriches hearts
O He Who consoles hearts
O He Who grants peace to hearts

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He Who created then perfected
O He Who measured then guided
O He Who removes hardship
O He Who hears secret conversation
O He Who rescues the drowning
O He Who saves the distressed
O He Who heals the sick
O He Who gives life and death
O He Who makes laugh and cry
O He Who leads astray and guides

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Light of light
O Illuminator of light
O Creator of light
O Controller of light
O Determiner of light
O Light before all light
O Light after all light
O Light above all light

lines.arabic: يَا نُورًا لَمْ يَكُنْ مِثْلُهُ نُورٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā Nūran lam yakun mithluhū nūr

translation.en: O Light whose like has never been
O Light that no other light resembles

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He Whose gift is noble
O He Whose action is gentle
O He Whose grace is encompassing
O He Whose punishment is severe
O He Whose reward is great
O He Whose speech is a cure
O He Whose pardon is vast
O He Whose Throne is great
O He Whose presence is eternal
O He Whose bestowal is abundant

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He Who created me and perfected me
O He Who provided for me and nurtured me
O He Who fed me and gave me drink
O He Who brought me near and drew me close
O He Who protected me and kept me safe
translation.tr: Ey beni koruyan ve muhafaza eden

translation.en: O He Who preserved me and healed me
translation.tr: Ey beni esirgeyen ve âfiyet veren

translation.en: O He Who gave me success and guided me
translation.tr: Ey beni muvaffak kılıp hidayet eden

translation.en: O He Who honored me and enriched me
O He Who inspired me and directed me
O He Who strengthened me and supported me

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Generous beyond all generosity
O Ancient beyond all antiquity
O Merciful beyond all mercy
O Knowing beyond all knowledge
O Wise beyond all wisdom
O Great beyond all greatness
O Mighty beyond all might
O Gentle beyond all gentleness
O Beautiful beyond all beauty
O Powerful beyond all power

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ وَاحِدٌ فِي ذَاتِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Wāḥidun fī dhātih

translation.en: O He Who is One in His essence

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فَرِيدٌ فِي صِفَاتِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Farīdun fī ṣifātih

translation.en: O He Who is Unique in His attributes

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ دَائِمٌ فِي وُجُودِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Dā'imun fī wujūdih

translation.en: O He Who is Eternal in His existence

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مُتَعَالٍ فِي جَلَالِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Muta'ālin fī jalālih

translation.en: O He Who is Exalted in His glory

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ ثَابِتٌ فِي وَعْدِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Thābitun fī wa'dih

translation.en: O He Who is Firm in His promise

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَزِيزٌ فِي قُدْرَتِهِ

translation.en: O He Who is Mighty in His power

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ شَدِيدٌ فِي عِقَابِهِ

translation.en: O He Who is Severe in His punishment

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ سَرِيعٌ فِي حِسَابِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Sarī'un fī ḥisābih

translation.en: O He Who is Swift in His reckoning

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ قَرِيبٌ فِي رَحْمَتِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Qarībun fī raḥmatih

translation.en: O He Who is Near in His compassion

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ رَاضٍ بِقَلِيلِ الشُّكْرِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Rāḍin bi qalīli'sh-shukr

translation.en: O He Who is Content with little gratitude

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Lord of Prophets and the Righteous
O Lord of the Truthful and the Pious
translation.tr: Ey sıddıkların ve takvâ sahiplerinin Rabbi

translation.en: O Lord of Paradise and Hellfire
O Lord of the small and the great
O Lord of seeds and fruits
O Lord of rivers and trees
O Lord of deserts and seas
O Lord of night and day
O Lord of the manifest and the hidden
O Lord of everything

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ أَمْرُهُ بَيْنَ الْكَافِ وَالنُّونِ

translation.en: O He Whose command is between the kaf and the nun
translation.tr: Ey emri kâf ile nûn arasında olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ الْإِنْسَانَ مِنْ طِينٍ

translation.en: O He Who created the human from clay

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ الْجِنَّ مِنْ نَارٍ

translation.en: O He Who created the jinn from fire

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ الْمَلَائِكَةَ مِنْ نُورٍ

translation.en: O He Who created the angels from light
O He Whose glory fills the heavens
O He Whose light illuminates the earth
O He Who is exalted in the heights
O He Who is glorified in the depths

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ فِيهِ مَلْجَأٌ مِنْ كُلِّ خَوْفٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man fīhi malja'un min kulli khawf

translation.en: O He in Whom is refuge from all fear
O He to Whom all matters return

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.
